title: Phosphophyllite
description: The main mineral is Phosphophyllite, a fragile crystal, which is easily broken, but thanks to other minerals it will be possible to strengthen Phosphophyllite tools, it will also increase its resistance every time you repair Phosphophyllite tools.
body:
![Phosphophyllite Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/461e60e95d7a53d2936aa9bcd4fd364cf392dd45.png)

## **Phosphophyllite Mod - Enhance Your Survival Experience**

**Important Notice:**  
**Version 1.12.2 is no longer supported.** The mod is now only available for **Minecraft Forge 1.20.1**.

The **Phosphophyllite Mod** is designed to improve your survival gameplay by introducing a variety of new minerals, tools, and mechanics that bring more depth and challenge to your Minecraft adventures. This mod adds a unique resource system with new minerals that can be found in both the **Overworld** and the **Nether**, each offering their own set of benefits and crafting possibilities.

### **What Does the Phosphophyllite Mod Add?**

At the heart of this mod is the **Phosphophyllite**, a fragile yet powerful crystal that you can mine and craft into tools. While Phosphophyllite tools start out weak, their durability and strength increase every time you repair them, making them a unique asset for survival. These tools, when combined with other special minerals, can be strengthened, allowing you to take on even the toughest mobs and environments.

#### **New Minerals and Ores**
- **Phosphophyllite**: The core mineral of the mod, known for its delicate nature but incredible potential when enhanced with other resources.
- **Zinc** and **Corrupted Zinc**: Found in both the Overworld and Nether, these new ores provide the player with new crafting possibilities, allowing you to forge advanced materials like **Zinc Ingots** and purify **Corrupted Raw Zinc** into valuable resources.
  
#### **New Tools and Crafting Recipes**
- **Phosphophyllite Axe**: A unique tool made from Phosphophyllite that is fragile at first but can be enhanced for better performance. Perfect for chopping down trees and breaking through obstacles.
- **Stone Stick**: A simple yet effective crafting component used to make tools and other essential items.

#### **Advancements and Achievements**
The mod comes with several custom advancements that reward you for crafting specific items, mining rare ores, and mastering the use of the new minerals. These advancements encourage players to explore and experiment with the new mechanics.

### **Key Mechanics**
- **Tool Enhancement**: The more you use and repair **Phosphophyllite** tools, the stronger and more durable they become. This encourages players to continue using and upgrading their gear throughout their survival journey. (Still in Development)
- **New Resource Cycle**: As you mine new minerals like **Zinc** and **Corrupted Zinc**, you'll need to purify and process these materials to unlock their full potential. This adds a new layer of resource management and exploration to the game.
- **Environmental Impact**: Certain minerals, like **Phosphophyllite Dust**, have unique effects when thrown, such as granting glowing, haste, and nausea effects. These new mechanics provide strategic advantages and risks when used in combat or exploration.

### **Why Should You Play With This Mod?**
The **Phosphophyllite Mod** adds a fresh layer of depth to Minecraft survival by introducing a dynamic resource system with materials that evolve as you progress. Whether you're a player looking to enhance your tools, discover new minerals, or explore new crafting possibilities, this mod offers a rewarding experience that will keep you engaged.

With its unique blend of new mechanics, crafting options, and the exciting potential of **Phosphophyllite**, this mod is perfect for players who want to bring a new challenge to their Minecraft worlds.

### **Join the Community**
Stay up to date with the latest updates and share your experiences with other players on our [Discord](https://discord.gg/qe6cxbfW8s). The Phosphophyllite Mod is continually updated, with new features and improvements added regularly.

### **Note:** Not all features are fully implemented yet. Some aspects of the mod are still being developed, and additional updates will continue to add new content and mechanics in the future.
---
**With love,**  
**JEAMCube**
